## Target Branch

- [ ] This PR targets `test`
- [ ] This PR targets `main` only because it promotes `test` to production

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, build hooks, wallet seeds, or private endpoints are included
- [ ] No unnecessary workflow, dependency, or deployment changes

Visual changes should include before/after screenshots or a video/GIF in the PR description. New visible pages and navigation still need before/after evidence. A deploy preview link alone is not enough.
